title: Sword PvP by Damiann
description: A Beautiful PvP Resource Pack for Sword Game Mode ,Featuring a Clean Short Sword and More, PERFECT For Sword PvP Lovers!
body:
**A smooth and clean PvP Pack for minecraft sword pvp lovers!**

### What does it do?
- Tiny and clean sword texture 
- Smooth terrain textures
- Small utils perfect for a clean view 
- Better utlities textures

### Want to make your gameplay smoother? 
- Make sure you have a stable framerate, atleast 60 
- Use a good motion blur (20%-50%)
- Play on 2 chunks with fog ON , i know , its weird ,but your game will look 70% smoother and cleaner, and on sword pvp servers, chunks don't really matters
